generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent, DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement with position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionData
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent, DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement with position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionData
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the end of the hoist for picking up pucks"
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorController
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorController
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined crane state data including motor positions, swing angle, wind speed, and operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, CartMotorPositionData, HoistMotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModelFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the crane for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization, GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance ArcadiaMBSEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia-based Model-Based Systems Engineering model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelArchitecture
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization of database, MQTT broker, and dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for crane control and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance C4ModelArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino IDE for microcontroller programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal movement paths for reduced swing using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations via Grafana and manual control via HMI"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, ManualControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measured vs. simulated trajectories with threshold-based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Models physical dynamics for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal movement paths for reduced swing"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stored historical crane data for analysis and validation"
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates fault alerts when trajectory deviations exceed thresholds"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for crane operations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Modeling physical dynamics for trajectory testing"
]

instance ManualControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator configuration of logging parameters and manual control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends trajectory commands and control signals to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into motor controller instructions (via TMC4671-Eval controllers) for precise movement of the cart and hoist. The Trajectory Generator Service generates optimal movement paths that are executed through this interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data logging and validation. The Continuous Validation Service processes measurements and simulations at a frequency sufficient for immediate fault detection, while the Logging Application streams crane state data without specified fixed intervals, ensuring near-instantaneous updates for operational monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system orchestrated via C4 Model architecture: Physical Crane (hardware), Physical Crane Interface (Python connector), Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface (HMI), and digital twin services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker). Components interact through MQTT messaging and Python modules, deployed on a single personal computer with Docker containers for key services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (via CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360 and Arcadia MBSE models) and 'as operated' (real-time sensor data logging and control during crane operation). The digital twin integrates design-phase models with operational data for comprehensive lifecycle representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares measured trajectory execution data with simulated trajectories using distance metrics (e.g., RMSE), with thresholds triggering operator alerts. Model validation techniques from prior publications ([5]) are reused to ensure simulation fidelity, with discrepancies indicating potential faults or model inaccuracies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for inter-service communication. The Physical Crane Interface uses Python to interface with Arduino and motor controllers, transmitting sensor data and receiving control commands over a local network with minimal latency."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer. Database, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard run in Docker containers managed by a single docker-compose file. Python modules (gantrylib) execute natively on the host OS, with Arduino code deployed directly to the microcontroller hardware."
]
